user.title: STIHL iMow v2 — Login
user.description: Enter your STIHL myimow.stihl.com account credentials.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the STIHL cloud.

intent.name: Send command
intent.description: Send a command to an iMow mower.

action.name: Action
action.description: Command to send: start-mowing, pause, resume, end-job-and-return-to-dock, toDocking, edgeMowing, startMowingFromPoint

mower_device.name: Mower device
mower_device.description: Device ID from the device registry (one of mower_device or mower_name required).

mower_name.name: Mower name
mower_name.description: Friendly name of the mower device.

startpoint.name: Start point
startpoint.description: Zone / start-point index for the startMowingFromPoint action.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Mowing duration in seconds for start-mowing / startMowingFromPoint (optional; uses the mower default if omitted).
